Describe each step as it happens during the unboxing of the Marvel Collector Corps package.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a brown cardboard box with a Groot illustration is held by hands; at 4s, the box is rotated to show the top text; at 10s, the box is tilted to reveal the side panel graphics; at 16s, the lid is opened to display a Starlord pin inside.
